description: Mexican drug cartel active in Chiapas and Guatemala, founded in 2022 as a splinter group of the Sinaloa Cartel. It emerged after a power struggle and defection to the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. The group is involved in drug trafficking across the Guatemala-Mexico border and has published execution videos. Its founder was killed in 2025.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Guatemala , the cartel is primarily involved in illegal drug trafficking through the Guatemala–Mexico border , specifically the Chiapas- Huehuetenango land border.
country_links.context: The cartel operates in Guatemala, collaborating with local criminal groups and trafficking drugs across the border.
